subgraphs.name: Video Inpaint (VOID)
subgraphs.description: Removes objects from video by inpainting masked regions using VOID (CogVideoX), with SAM3 text-guided segmentation and optional two-pass optical-flow refinement.

subgraphs.name: Image Segmentation (SAM3)
subgraphs.description: Segments images into masks using Meta SAM3 from text prompts, points, or boxes.
